title: Project Funding
description: Package a design for finance and send it to a financial institution.

steps.title: Funding overview
steps.description: The design's cost, savings and financing need.
steps.voiceScript: This is the funding view for the design: its cost, savings and financing need.
steps.captionText: This is the funding view for the design: its cost, savings and financing need.

steps.title: Generate the funding package
steps.description: A lender-ready pack of the numbers.

steps.captionText: Generate the funding package: a lender-ready pack of the project's numbers.

steps.title: Choose an institution
steps.description: Send the package to a financial institution.
